actions.script: var selectors = ${selectors_json}; var currentHost = window.location.hostname; var results = []; for (var i = 0; i < selectors.length; i++) { var sel = selectors[i]; var result = { name: sel.name, selector: sel.selector, is_multiple_value: sel.is_multiple_value, value: null }; try { if (sel.remove_selector && sel.remove_selector.length > 0) { for (var r = 0; r < sel.remove_selector.length; r++) { document.querySelectorAll(sel.remove_selector[r]).forEach(function(el) { el.remove(); }); } } if (sel.js_query) { try { var val = eval(sel.js_query); if (sel.is_multiple_value) { result.value = val !== null && val !== undefined ? (Array.isArray(val) ? val : [val]) : []; } else { result.value = Array.isArray(val) ? (val[0] || null) : val; } if (typeof result.value === 'object' && result.value !== null) { result.value = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(result.value)); } } catch(jsErr) { result.value = null; result.js_error = jsErr.message; } } if (result.value === null || result.value === undefined || (Array.isArray(result.value) && result.value.length === 0)) { if (sel.is_multiple_value) { var els = document.querySelectorAll(sel.selector); result.value = Array.from(els).map(function(el) { if (el.tagName === 'A') return { text: el.innerText.trim(), href: el.href }; if (el.tagName === 'IMG') return { src: el.src, alt: el.alt || '' }; if (el.tagName === 'META') return el.getAttribute('content') || ''; return el.getAttribute('href') || el.getAttribute('content') || el.getAttribute('src') || el.innerText.trim(); }); } else { var el = document.querySelector(sel.selector); if (el) { if (el.tagName === 'META') result.value = el.getAttribute('content') || ''; else if (el.tagName === 'A') result.value = { text: el.innerText.trim(), href: el.href }; else if (el.tagName === 'IMG') result.value = { src: el.src, alt: el.alt || '' }; else result.value = el.getAttribute('href') || el.getAttribute('content') || el.getAttribute('src') || el.innerText.trim(); } } } if (Array.isArray(result.value) && (sel.is_external_link || sel.is_internal_link)) { result.value = result.value.filter(function(item) { var href = typeof item === 'object' ? (item.href || item.src || '') : item; if (!href || typeof href !== 'string') return true; try { var u = new URL(href, window.location.origin); if (sel.is_external_link) return u.hostname !== currentHost; if (sel.is_internal_link) return u.hostname === currentHost; return true; } catch(e) { return false; } }); } } catch(e) { result.value = null; result.error = e.message; } results.push(result); } return JSON.stringify(results)
return JSON.stringify({ title: document.title, url: window.location.href, domain: window.location.hostname })
